title: Sleep Calculator
metaTitle: Sleep Calculator — Find Your Ideal Bedtime by Cycles
metaDescription: Calculate your ideal bedtime based on 90-minute sleep cycles and wake-up time. See optimal bedtimes for 4, 5, and 6 cycles. Free sleep cycle calculator.

inputs.label: Wake-Up Time
inputs.helpText: Enter your desired wake-up time in HH:MM format (e.g., 06:30 or 6:30 AM)

inputs.label: Time to Fall Asleep
inputs.helpText: Average time it takes you to fall asleep (most adults: 10-20 minutes)

outputs.label: Recommended Bedtime
outputs.description: Your ideal bedtime for 5 complete sleep cycles (7.5 hours of sleep), accounting for fall-asleep time

outputs.label: Total Sleep (Recommended)
outputs.description: Hours of sleep for the recommended 5-cycle option

formulaCitation: National Sleep Foundation sleep cycle research; Walker, M. Why We Sleep (2017)
formulaSource: National Sleep Foundation. Sleep Cycle Stages and Duration. Walker, M. Why We Sleep: Unlocking the Power of Sleep and Dreams. Scribner, 2017. Carskadon MA, Dement WC. Normal Human Sleep: An Overview. Principles and Practice of Sleep Medicine, 6th ed., 2017.
